title: Arvind Kejriwal contempt case to be heard by Delhi HC Justices Navin Chawla and Ravinder Dudeja tomorrow
description: A Division Bench of Justices Navin Chawla and Ravinder Dudeja of the Delhi High Court is likely to hear on Tuesday the suo motu criminal contempt of court case initiated against Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia, Sanjay Singh and other Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) leaders. The Justice Chawla-led bench currently holds the criminal contempt of court roster. Contempt proceedings have been initiated against the politicians for their "defamatory and vilifying allegations" against Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma,
